content: Astro treats plain <script> tags (no framework attributes) as TypeScript-processed, bundled, deduped client code — this is the correct home for a vanilla canvas module, no UI-framework island needed since there's no component tree to hydrate, just DOM+canvas imperative code. Scripts are scoped per-component by default; querySelector/getElementById wiring inside an IIFE or module is standard. This matches (not contradicts) the existing prototype's self-contained IIFE pattern.
